intro: Campanopsis pauciflora, commonly known as Chinese bugbane, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms associated with fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Campanopsis pauciflora include coumarins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Campanopsis pauciflora is often prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of dried roots and rhizomes for treating various health conditions.
